title: Airport Small Talk
description: Practice calm, confident small talk with a stranger in an airport while managing mild social anxiety.

steps.prompt: You are at the boarding gate. Your heart is beating fast. Take 3 deep breaths and notice what you see and hear.
Greet the person next to you and ask one simple question about their trip.
steps.successHint: Keep your sentence short and simple, like: 'Hi, is this your first time traveling here?'

steps.prompt: How did that feel? Choose one word: 'easier than expected', 'still scary', or 'impossible'.

title: Café Confidence
description: Order coffee in English while staying grounded and focused.

steps.prompt: Imagine the barista smiling at you. Visualize the scene going well.
Order a coffee with one extra detail: size, milk type, or flavor.
steps.successHint: Example: 'Hi, can I have a medium latte with oat milk, please?'

steps.prompt: Rate your confidence from 1–5 and write one thing that went well.
